user_query:
You're my LinkedIn content strategist for the launch of our SMB analytics tool, PulseBoard. Read the materials in input/ and produce a one-week LinkedIn content package tailored to the audience and brand voice.

Read these files:
- input/brief.md — brand, product, and voice brief
- input/audience.jsonl — audience segments and pain points
- input/constraints.yaml — preferred posting windows and policies

Deliver these artifacts under output/ exactly as named:
1) output/posts.csv — A 7-day plan with exactly 7 rows and these columns in this order: date (YYYY-MM-DD), day_of_week (e.g., Monday), time (24h HH:MM), hook, body, hashtags, cta. Requirements:
   - Each body is 120–300 words, avoids any URLs (no http/https), and includes at least one question to encourage comments.
   - Hashtags field contains 3–5 hashtags, each starting with #, separated by spaces.
   - At least two posts are founder-journey stories and at least two are product how-tos (reflect this in the body content and hook).
   - Align post times with the allowed windows in input/constraints.yaml.
2) output/hooks.txt — At least 20 distinct hook options (one per line). Keep each hook to 12 words or fewer.
3) output/hashtags.txt — At least 10 hashtag sets (one set per line). Each set should include 3–5 relevant hashtags.
4) output/ctas.txt — At least 10 strong comment-oriented CTAs (one per line).
5) output/schedule.md — A readable schedule with 7 entries (one per day), each including the day of week and chosen time.
6) output/export.json — A consolidated export as a JSON array of objects with keys {"type","time","value"}. Include at least: 7 entries with type="draft" (summaries of each post), 20 entries with type="hooks", 10 with type="hashtags", 10 with type="cta", and 7 with type="schedule".
7) output/summary.md — A planning summary with the following H2 sections: "Strategy", "Tone", and "Schedule Rationale". In Strategy, map the 7 posts to the brand’s pillars (e.g., how-tos, customer stories, founder journey, data literacy, industry commentary) and justify choices using the audience insights.

Notes:
- Do not place any deliverables outside output/.
- Follow brand voice from the brief and keep posts practical and non-buzzy.
- If referencing resources in bodies, write "link in comments" instead of including a URL in the body.
